headline: Planning a summer road trip? The right credit card can help you save
summary: A road trip can help you save as travel prices increase. Here’s how to get even more value with a rewards credit card.

headline: BTIG Reiterates Buy on Expedia Group, Maintains $330 Price Target
summary: BTIG  analyst Jake Fuller   reiterates Expedia Group (NASDAQ:EXPE) with a Buy and maintains $330 price target.
